allow: PowerShell(@\("C:\\Users\\fahad\\Desktop", "C:\\Users\\fahad\\OneDrive\\Desktop", "C:\\Users\\fahad\\Documents", "C:\\Users\\fahad\\OneDrive\\Documents", "C:\\Users\\fahad\\Downloads", "C:\\Users\\fahad\\projects", "C:\\dev", "C:\\projects"\) | ForEach-Object { if \(Test-Path $_\) { Get-ChildItem -Path $_ -Recurse -Filter "site-header.tsx" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Depth 6 | Select-Object FullName } })
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe predict.py "BREAKING: Scientists discover new exoplanet with water vapor in atmosphere using James Webb Space Telescope data")

PowerShell($ports = 3000, 3001, 3005, 3030, 5173, 8080; foreach \($p in $ports\) { $busy = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($busy\) { "PORT ${p}: BUSY \(pid $\($busy[0].OwningProcess\)\)" } else { "PORT ${p}: free" } })
